nodes.name: Greg Mitchell
nodes.description: Wants Drew to be tough, competent, successful. Signed him up for T-ball before he asked.

nodes.name: Karen Mitchell
nodes.description: Protective. Got her real estate license in '99 but keeps hours around the kids' schedule. Starting to feel the squeeze between identity-as-mother and identity-as-person.

nodes.name: Megan Mitchell
nodes.description: 10 years old, sharp, already competitive. Good at school, good at soccer, good at performing goodness. The standard Drew is measured against without anyone saying so.

nodes.name: Carol Novak
nodes.description: The soft landing. Reads to Drew, doesn't correct him, lets him be weird. Lives 10 minutes away in a smaller house full of books.

nodes.name: Connor Huang
nodes.description: Neighbor kid, same age. Taiwanese-American. In the same class since kindergarten. Connor is louder, braver, funnier. Drew's first real friend.

nodes.name: Mrs. Pollard
nodes.description: Second grade teacher at Mendenhall Elementary. Firm, fair, likes Drew because he's quiet and finishes his work. Doesn't notice what the quietness costs.
